reference: My son was diagnosed with immunoglobulin A nephropathy at age sixteen. He was taking prednisone up until he was seventeen. He is now eighteen and has developed a bald spot on the left side of his head. It started out small but has now grown to about the size of a nickel. Could this be a result of his diagnosis?
text: My son had died when he was a mere boy, only nine or possibly only sixteen. He was taking studies down after 1817. He is now eighteen and lives at a bald spot on the west side of the town. He started out small, but has no friends about the side of the moat. The best way to describe him.
